      "text": "30. Tad fazzija Mohsus us

Ura Dehla no tahs Juhda Zilts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "31. Un tas Deewa Gars irr
to peepiidijis ar Gudribu / ar
Gaprachann/ un ar Peemannif-
chann pee wiﬀa Darba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "32. Isdohmaht faprattigus
Darbus/ un strahdaht eekſch Sel-
ta/ un eekſch Sudraba/ un eekſch
Warra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "33. Un eekſch dahrgo Akmi-
Gr. nu-Greefchanas/ ka tee warr ee-
likti tapt / un eekſch Kohku Js-
greefchanas / par Strahdaschanu
wiﬀa wihsigä Rohku Darbä.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "34. Wiꞥsch irr tam arridsan
Sirdi dewis (zittus) mahziht /
tam un Nālivainam Akisamaka
Dehlam / no Danna Zilts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "35. Wiꞥsch irr tohs ar Sirds
Gr. Gudribu peepildijis / ka tee dar-
riht warr wiﬀu Darbu / weena
Ammatneeka/ un weena Audeja/
un weena ar Addatu-Rakstitaja
eekſch Paſillumu/ un eekſch Pur-
vura / un dahrga Sarkanuma /
un eekſch fmalkahm Dsihjahn:
Ir weena Wehwera/ ka tee dar-
riht warr wiﬀadu Darbu / un
isdohmaht faprattigas Darri-
chanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "1. Ad strahdaja
un Aātiabs/un
lam famannig
bija / kam tas KUNGS
dribu un Sapraschanu d
tee finnatu wiﬀu Darbu
poschann tahs fwehtas
pehz wiﬀu/ ko tas KUN
pawehlejis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "2. Jo Mohsus bija
Bezaleëlü/ un Aātiabu/
nu / kam gudra Sirds
Sirdi tas KUNGS
dewis bij/ wiﬀu/ kam S
fahs pee to Darbu eet
taijiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "3. Un tee nehme preeſ
fu wiﬀu to Pazelfchanu
ri / ko tee Israëta Behr
neffuschi / par to Darb
fwehtas Weetas Taiifs
tee to darritu/Jr tee ati
ik rihtu pee winna lab
Uppurus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "4. Tapehz nahze wiﬀ
kas wiﬀu fwehtas Weet
darrija / ikweens sawu
kas tam bij jadarra : u
naja us Mohsu/ fazzid
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "5. Tee Laudis nefē p

"
